features: Strawberry Kiwi Digestive Support Powder: Gut Guardian is a plant-based digestive support powder for men and women. This gut cleanse helps to support digestion, ease bloating, balances your microbiome, and promotes gut health - anytime, anywhere. Includes 30 servings of strawberry kiwi-flavored relief.

Support Smooth Digestion: Formulated with 4,000 mg of organic soluble fiber to support smooth, comfortable bowel movements and daily digestive balance. This gentle fiber blend helps improve regularity without harsh laxatives or cramping.

Balance Gut Health: Each serving delivers 4 billion CFUs of probiotics plus L-Glutamine to help support the gut lining and maintain a healthy microbiome. Our formula is designed to support digestion, nutrient absorption, and overall gut comfort. A balanced gut can support more consistent energy, clearer skin, and everyday comfort.

Bloating Relief from Herbs: Our digestive supplement is powered by Organic Ginger, Lemon Balm, and Apple Cider Vinegar to help reduce bloating and gas discomfort. Stop puffing out after meals and feel a happier belly.

Clean, Delicious, & Expert Formulated: This great-tasting fiber supplement drink mix is made with zero sugar, no stevia, no preservatives, and no artificial ingredients. It’s non-GMO, vegan, keto-friendly, third-party tested, and made in California.

Easy to Use Digestive Support: Mix 1 stick pack with 8 oz of water (electric whisk recommended). Start with 1 serving daily (temporary bloating is normal), then increase gradually to 2-3 servings as your body adjusts. Gut Guardian helps fill the fiber gap and supports digestive comfort as part of a balanced wellness routine—including GLP focused lifestyles.
ingredients: Organic Acacia, Organic Jerusalem Artichoke, Organic Cluster Bean, 4B CFU Probiotics, Organic Apple Cider Vinegar, Organic Ginger, Organic Lemon Balm, L-Glutamine. Fruit Juice, Organic Flavoring, Monk Fruit, L-Malic Acid (Non-GMO), Bamboo Extract, Turmeric or Beet Root.
parentTitle: Feel Goods Gut Guardian, Gut Health Powder Drink Mix - Probiotic Fiber Powder with Prebiotics & L Glutamine for Digestive Health, Bloating Relief & Digestion Support - Zero Sugar & Organic Flavor
safetyWarning: Legal Disclaimer: Statements regarding dietary supplements have not been evaluated by the FDA and are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or health condition.
title: Feel Goods Gut Guardian, Gut Health Powder Drink Mix - Probiotic Fiber with Prebiotics & L Glutamine for Digestive Health, Bloating Relief & Digestion Support, Gut Cleanse - Zero Sugar, Organic Flavor
